mediaconvert.preset.Category.Docs: The new category for the preset, if you are changing it.

mediaconvert.preset.Description.Docs: The new description for the preset, if you are changing it.

mediaconvert.preset.Name.Docs: The name of the preset that you are modifying.

mediaconvert.preset.SettingsJson.Docs: Specify, in JSON format, the transcoding job settings for this output preset. This specification must conform to the AWS Elemental MediaConvert job validation. For information about forming this specification, see the Remarks section later in this topic.  For more information about MediaConvert output presets, see [Working with AWS Elemental MediaConvert Output Presets](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/working-with-presets.html) in the *AWS Elemental MediaConvert User Guide*.

mediaconvert.preset.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
